name: Integration - End-to-End Summarization and Email Flow
description: Tests the full workflow from input normalization, preprocessing, LLM summary generation, action item extraction, formatting, consent validation, to email sending.
input: MeetingNotesRequest with valid transcript, summary_length, user_email, participant_emails, user_consent=True passed to MeetingNotesSummarizerAgent.process_meeting_notes
output: MeetingNotesResponse with all fields populated and email_status='sent'
success_criteria: InputHandler.receive_input is called and returns normalized input
Preprocessor.normalize_text is called and returns cleaned text
LLMService.generate_summary is called and returns summary
LLMService.extract_action_items is called and returns action items
SummaryFormatter.format_summary is called and returns formatted summary
EmailSender.send_email is called and returns True
error_scenarios: Any service returns an error or None
